query: Audit this RAG and agent system for production readiness, including retrieval quality, latency, tool safety, and evaluation gaps.
expected_behavior: Inspects retrieval, chunking, metadata filtering, reranking, evals, and latency paths
Flags access-control, prompt-injection, unbounded loop, and non-idempotent tool risks
Suggests practical measurement and guardrail improvements before large rewrites
Separates code-level optimizations from architecture-level design changes
